title: microsorum diversifolium
intro: Microsorum diversifolium, also known as the Divaricate Creeping Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Microsorum diversifolium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
